# Hanuš Transport s.r.o.

> Czech freight transport company based in Slaný, offering road haulage, construction materials transport, pallet delivery, and used electronics collection across the Czech Republic.

Hanuš Transport s.r.o. (IČO: 06340199) operates a fleet of 6 vehicles ranging from 3.5t vans to 12t trucks, all equipped with hydraulic lifts. Founded in 2011, the company specializes in reliable goods transport with GPS tracking and full shipment insurance.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://hanustransport.cz/): Company overview and services
- [Road Freight](https://hanustransport.cz/sluzby/nakladni-autodoprava/): General freight transport across Czech Republic
- [Construction Materials](https://hanustransport.cz/sluzby/preprava-stavebnin/): Building materials transport with hydraulic lifts
- [Pallet Transport](https://hanustransport.cz/sluzby/preprava-palet/): Euro pallet delivery, up to 18 pallets per trip
- [E-Waste Collection](https://hanustransport.cz/sluzby/svoz-elektrospotrebicu/): Used electronics collection in Central Bohemia
- [Fleet](https://hanustransport.cz/vozovy-park/): Vehicle specifications and capabilities
- [Pricing](https://hanustransport.cz/cenik/): Quote request form
- [Contact](https://hanustransport.cz/kontakt/): Phone, email, company details
- [About](https://hanustransport.cz/o-nas/): Company history and team
- [FAQ](https://hanustransport.cz/casto-kladene-dotazy/): Frequently asked questions

## Regional Coverage

- [Slaný](https://hanustransport.cz/autodoprava/slany/): Home base
- [Kladno](https://hanustransport.cz/autodoprava/kladno/): 15 km from base
- [Prague](https://hanustransport.cz/autodoprava/praha/): Daily routes
- [Central Bohemia](https://hanustransport.cz/autodoprava/stredocesky-kraj/): Primary region

## Guides

- [How Transport Pricing Works](https://hanustransport.cz/pruvodce/jak-se-pocita-cena-prepravy/)
- [How to Prepare a Shipment](https://hanustransport.cz/pruvodce/jak-pripravit-zasilku/)
